name: QA 1190
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1190

Paranoid PCP setup checkout ... really a guard before running QA,

but this accumulates the knowledge for QA catostrophic failures

that follow Murhy's Law #2: Law #1 was optimistic



Copyright (c) 2020 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform fedora_rawhide reproduce

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1190.out.bad)
19c19,22
< $PCP_PMDAS_DIR/pipe/pipe.conf ... OK
---
> $PCP_PMDAS_DIR/pipe/pipe.conf ... BAD (QA text found)
>   empty-line   pcpqa   echo
>   echo-all     pcpqa   echo $0
>   echo-two     pcpqa   echo $1 $2
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h d6bbf0991c84 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h d6bbf0991c84 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h d6bbf0991c84 -f simple.numfetch
